markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on 2026 content strategy and priorities.](https://fathom.video/share/2fXNZe2WjVEJYyxL7vi4LWihWDxvvjXT?tab=summary&timestamp=397.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Strategic Pivot:** Shift focus from transactional, feature-based sales to a value-driven narrative for longer-term plans. This is necessary because AI receptionist customization requires more time for setup and refinement than the simpler Virtual Receptionist service.](https://fathom.video/share/2fXNZe2WjVEJYyxL7vi4LWihWDxvvjXT?tab=summary&timestamp=562.0)
  - **Legal Industry Focus:** Prioritize the legal market to accelerate growth. The goal is to reclaim \#1 SEO ranking for "AI receptionist for lawyers," a position previously held for "virtual receptionist."
  - [**Content Hub as SEO Engine:** Use the Knowledge Hub as a strategic asset. By publishing deep, use-case-rich content (e.g., specific law firm scenarios), it will serve as a contextual library that signals authority to Google and supports product pages.](https://fathom.video/share/2fXNZe2WjVEJYyxL7vi4LWihWDxvvjXT?tab=summary&timestamp=1163.0)
  - [**LLM Visibility Overhaul:** Overhaul the LLM visibility tracking setup (currently Scrunch) to align with the new strategy. This includes creating 300–350 new prompts and migrating to GrowthX's new, included tool, Check That, AI, for better benchmarking.](https://fathom.video/share/2fXNZe2WjVEJYyxL7vi4LWihWDxvvjXT?tab=summary&timestamp=1554.0)

## Topics

### 2026 Business Priorities & Narrative Shift

  - [**Problem:** The current homepage narrative is split between investor-focused messaging and customer-facing brand representation, which creates misalignment.](https://fathom.video/share/2fXNZe2WjVEJYyxL7vi4LWihWDxvvjXT?tab=summary&timestamp=467.0)
  - [**New Narrative:** Shift from selling features for transactional, month-to-month plans to selling value for longer-term commitments.](https://fathom.video/share/2fXNZe2WjVEJYyxL7vi4LWihWDxvvjXT?tab=summary&timestamp=562.0)
      - [**Rationale:** AI receptionist customization requires more time for setup and refinement than the simpler Virtual Receptionist service. Longer plans provide the necessary runway to deliver this value.](https://fathom.video/share/2fXNZe2WjVEJYyxL7vi4LWihWDxvvjXT?tab=summary&timestamp=592.0)
      - [**Value Proposition:** Position Smith.ai as a full-service partner ("we hold the string") that implements and refines the AI solution, not just a DIY software provider.](https://fathom.video/share/2fXNZe2WjVEJYyxL7vi4LWihWDxvvjXT?tab=summary&timestamp=692.0)

### Legal Industry Focus & SEO Strategy

  - **Goal:** Accelerate growth in the legal market by reclaiming the \#1 SEO ranking for "AI receptionist for lawyers."
  - [**SEO Gap:** Smith.ai is not ranking for key terms like "answering service for attorneys," despite being mentioned in AI overviews. Competitors like Ruby and MyCase are outranking Smith.ai.](https://fathom.video/share/2fXNZe2WjVEJYyxL7vi4LWihWDxvvjXT?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [**Action Plan:**](https://fathom.video/share/2fXNZe2WjVEJYyxL7vi4LWihWDxvvjXT?tab=summary&timestamp=1824.0)
      - [**On-Page:** Add deeper, human-focused examples to content. Instead of just "personal injury," use specific scenarios like "car accident" or "slip and fall." This signals deeper expertise to Google.](https://fathom.video/share/2fXNZe2WjVEJYyxL7vi4LWihWDxvvjXT?tab=summary&timestamp=1490.0)
      - [**Off-Page:** Direct link-building efforts (with Kinga) to target landing pages for high-value legal keywords. Backlinks are a critical ranking factor (50–60% of effort).](https://fathom.video/share/2fXNZe2WjVEJYyxL7vi4LWihWDxvvjXT?tab=summary&timestamp=1056.0)
      - [**Internal Linking:** Channel traffic from high-authority Knowledge Hub articles to "money pages" (e.g., industry pages, VR product pages) to distribute SEO value.](https://fathom.video/share/2fXNZe2WjVEJYyxL7vi4LWihWDxvvjXT?tab=summary&timestamp=1296.0)

### Content & Persona Development

  - [**Content Artifacts:** Update existing artifacts (e.g., audience personas, customer testimonials) to reflect the new strategy and legal focus.](https://fathom.video/share/2fXNZe2WjVEJYyxL7vi4LWihWDxvvjXT?tab=summary&timestamp=397.0)
  - [**Legal Persona Pipeline:** Create a dedicated persona pipeline for the legal industry, breaking it down into 2–3 sub-personas (e.g., solo attorney, firm partner) to enable more targeted content.](https://fathom.video/share/2fXNZe2WjVEJYyxL7vi4LWihWDxvvjXT?tab=summary&timestamp=856.0)
  - [**Knowledge Hub Content Mix:** Maintain a content mix to avoid appearing as a single-industry site to Google.](https://fathom.video/share/2fXNZe2WjVEJYyxL7vi4LWihWDxvvjXT?tab=summary&timestamp=1163.0)
      - [**Legal:** 60–70% of examples.](https://fathom.video/share/2fXNZe2WjVEJYyxL7vi4LWihWDxvvjXT?tab=summary&timestamp=1163.0)
      - [**Other Professional Services:** 30–40% of examples.](https://fathom.video/share/2fXNZe2WjVEJYyxL7vi4LWihWDxvvjXT?tab=summary&timestamp=1163.0)
  - [**Content Accuracy:** Use hypothetical scenarios in the Knowledge Hub to avoid making promises that sales cannot fulfill.](https://fathom.video/share/2fXNZe2WjVEJYyxL7vi4LWihWDxvvjXT?tab=summary&timestamp=1366.0)

### LLM Visibility & Tool Migration

  - [**Problem:** A recent, drastic drop in Scrunch data is likely a technical tracking issue, not a performance problem.](https://fathom.video/share/2fXNZe2WjVEJYyxL7vi4LWihWDxvvjXT?tab=summary&timestamp=1554.0)
  - [**Solution:** Overhaul the LLM visibility setup to align with the new strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/2fXNZe2WjVEJYyxL7vi4LWihWDxvvjXT?tab=summary&timestamp=1609.0)
      - [**Prompts:** Create 300–350 new prompts per persona and cluster to reflect the updated messaging.](https://fathom.video/share/2fXNZe2WjVEJYyxL7vi4LWihWDxvvjXT?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
      - [**Migration:** Migrate from Scrunch to GrowthX's new, included tool, Check That, AI, in February.](https://fathom.video/share/2fXNZe2WjVEJYyxL7vi4LWihWDxvvjXT?tab=summary&timestamp=1683.0)
      - [**Benefit:** Check That, AI, offers industry benchmarking and dynamic competitor suggestions, solving key limitations of Scrunch.](https://fathom.video/share/2fXNZe2WjVEJYyxL7vi4LWihWDxvvjXT?tab=summary&timestamp=1727.0)

      - [Share the Airtable link for the new content plan review.](https://fathom.video/share/2fXNZe2WjVEJYyxL7vi4LWihWDxvvjXT?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
